description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring large glass windows and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with gray accents, and the property includes a spacious driveway, a pergola-covered patio, and landscaped green areas. The house has multiple entry points, with the main entrance marked by a tall glass door and flanked by vertical windows. The rear of the house opens to a backyard with a hot tub and additional seating areas, while the side yard is bordered by trees and shrubs for privacy. The upper floor includes a balcony with glass railings, providing outdoor living space and views of the surrounding area. The overall layout emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and white exterior, featuring a driveway, patio, balcony, and landscaped yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, tall glass door, driveway, and a pergola-covered patio on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a hot tub, green lawn, and multiple glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patio area, additional entry points, and landscaped greenery along the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the upper balcony with glass railings, side yard with trees, and a clear view of the house's modern window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a tall glass door, vertical windows, and a minimalist overhang with no steps or porch.
